These cymbidiums do not currently have flower stems or flowers, but they are easy to care for, grow quickly, are resilient, and highly adaptable.
These cymbidiums are easy to care for, grow quickly, are resilient, and highly adaptable. They are an excellent choice for starting or expanding your orchid collection.
Please contact us by email with any questions. Strongly Fragrant Cymbidium Old Variety "Chengmei" Indoor and Outdoor Potted Plant, Easy to Bloom
description: Cymbidiums are shipped bare-root. The roots may be dry upon arrival—this is normal. Please soak them in warm water for a few minutes before planting. These are small seedlings, not mature plants, making them ideal for starting or expanding your orchid collection. Flowering Details: Oncidiums and Dendrobiums are expected to bloom soon. Vandas and Cattleyas are smaller plants and will take slightly longer to bloom. Seasonal Notes: In winter, we will use other orchids (such as Torumnia, Ionopsis, or Lip-lipped Orchid) instead of Phalaenopsis. In summer, we will apply a natural white protective film to the orchid leaves to protect against fungi, pests, and high temperatures—do not wash off this protective film. Remember: For optimal orchid growth, allow the soil to dry completely before watering again.
